channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump edges out Harris with early voters in battleground states
item.description: Former President Trump has a slight edge over Vice President Harris with early voters in battleground states, new polling shows, a promising sign for the Republican in the highly competitive presidential race.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Tim Walz boasts about having support of Dick Cheney, Bernie Sanders, Taylor Swift during Wisconsin rally
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz boasted of having the support of Dick Cheney, Bernie Sanders and Taylor Swift, during a rally in Wisconsin on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rep. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, challenger Joe Kent to face off in Washington 3rd District debate
item.description: One of the races that could determine the fate of Congress this election season happens to be the rematch race for Washington's 3rd District, and on Monday night, the candidates will debate on KOIN 6.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Flanigan, NewsNation

item.title: Harris and Trump hold rival events in battleground Pennsylvania
item.description: OAKS, Pa. (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris and former President Donald Trump took their fight for Pennsylvania to opposite ends of the state Monday, with Harris speaking in the northwest corner in Erie and Trump in the southeastern suburbs of Philadelphia.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, WILL WEISSERT and MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota city says Trump campaign still owes more than $200,000 for July rally
item.description: ST. CLOUD, Minn. (AP) — Former President Donald Trump’s campaign still owes St. Cloud nearly $209,000 for services related to a July rally, officials from the central Minnesota city say. The bill is for services beyond what the city normally provides, The Minnesota Star Tribune reported Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump suggests using National Guard, military against 'enemy from within'
item.description: Former President Donald Trump in a Sunday interview suggested using the National Guard or the military on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Kamala Harris will sit down with Bret Baier for her first Fox News interview
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris will be interviewed by Fox News anchor Bret Baier on Wednesday in Pennsylvania as she steps up her travel and conversations with media outlets in the closing stretch of the presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sending a THAAD air defense system to Israel adds to strain on US Army forces
item.description: U.S. Army leaders say the deployment of a Terminal High Altitude Area Defense battery to Israel and roughly 100 soldiers to operate it will add to strains on the Army’s air defense forces.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Republicans pour money into Wisconsin Senate race Democrats say will be close
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Sensing an opportunity in swing-state Wisconsin, Republicans are pouring money into the bid to unseat incumbent Democratic Sen. Tammy Baldwin in that state's closely watched Senate race.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Columbus Day Flashback: Harris excoriated European explorers for 'wave of devastation' to Native peoples
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris' 2021 comments claiming the U.S. must "not shy away" from it's "shameful past" of European explorers resurfaced on social media this election cycle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top House committee launches probe into Biden admin 'priorities' on FEMA hurricane relief, migrant spending
item.description: Republicans on the House Homeland Security Committee are investigating the Department of Homeland Security's priorities when it comes to disaster relief and funding for migrants at the southern border.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio GOP Senate challenger reacts to polls showing dead heat in critical Senate race: 'Radical liberal'
item.description: Fox News Digital spoke to Ohio GOP Sen. candidate Bernie Moreno about why polls are trending in his direction in his highly watched race that could determine Senate control.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jill Biden expected to hold surrogate events for Harris
item.description: Several Democratic consultants told NewsNation – even with his low approval numbers – Biden can be beneficial to Harris in key areas. .
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Harris gives Democrats a boost, but control of House up for grabs
item.description: Election experts are pointing to data saying Harris has clearly been an overall asset to the Democrats’ downballot prospects.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Voters with disabilities are feeling ignored by presidential candidates
item.description: A new report from Rutgers University estimates that about 40.2 million eligible voters in the quickly approaching U.S. presidential election are disabled.
item.dc:creator: KENYA HUNTER and AYANNA ALEXANDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Most AAPI adults think immigrants give US a major economic boost: Poll
item.description: When it comes to the risks posed by illegal immigration, though, their views are similar to those of Americans overall.
item.dc:creator: TERRY TANG and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Senate rankings: 5 seats most likely to flip
item.description: The battle for the Senate majority has hit its final month as Republicans race to end their four-year stint in the minority. The GOP needs to win only one of two competitive races in red states — Montana and Ohio — to do just that, barring a surprise loss elsewhere.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris announces a new plan to empower Black men as she tries to energize them to vote for her
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris has announced a series of proposals designed to give Black men more economic opportunities as she works to energize a key voting bloc that has Democrats concerned about a lack of enthusiasm.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Are political disagreements stressing you out? Here are tips to bridge the divide
item.description: With only weeks to a divisive election it can be hard to talk politics. Polarization can damage our relationships and our health. We have strategies to reduce election stress, starting with ourselves.
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey, MPR News

item.title: Trump's protests aside, his agenda has plenty of overlap with Project 2025
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Donald Trump insists that Project 2025, a nearly 1,000-page blueprint for a hard-right turn in American government and society, does not reflect his priorities for a White House encore. “I haven’t read it.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump calls for adding 10,000 Border Patrol agents after derailing a bipartisan border bill
item.description: PRESCOTT VALLEY, Ariz. (AP) — Former President Donald Trump on Sunday proposed hiring 10,000 additional Border Patrol agents and giving them a $10,000 retention and signing bonus, after he derailed a bipartisan bill earlier this year that included funding for more border personnel.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man with loaded gun arrested at checkpoint near Donald Trump's weekend rally in Southern California
item.description: Authorities say a Nevada man with a shotgun and a loaded handgun in his vehicle was arrested at a security checkpoint outside Donald Trump’s rally Saturday night in the Southern California desert.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump says national abortion ban is 'off the table,' but 'we’ll see what happens'
item.description: The former president said overturning Roe v. Wade was something “every Democrat and Republican wanted.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Johnson: Additional hurricane aid 'can wait' until Congress is back in session
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Sunday said passing additional hurricane aid for states impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton “can wait” until Congress is back in session after the election.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here are the states we could be waiting on to declare a Harris-Trump winner
item.description: Voters are increasingly likely to have to wait past Election Day to find out who will become their next president. Among the battleground states, Georgia could be the first to be called, even as early as midnight, some experts predict.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hits Harris on immigration in her home state of California
item.description: Former President Trump slammed Vice President Harris in her native California on Saturday evening, ranting about migrants and bashing illegal immigration in the Golden State.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hears at a Latino campaign event from someone who lived in the US illegally
item.description: Minutes after Donald Trump delivered his standard warnings about drug dealers and criminals illegally crossing the border during a Saturday campaign event, the former president heard from someone who was once in the country illegally but now plans to vote for him.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Abortion has passed inflation as the top election issue for women under 30, survey finds
item.description: About 2 in 5 in the group of young voters said abortion was their top concern in the recent survey, compared with 1 in 5 who ranked it most important in the same survey in the spring.
item.dc:creator: GEOFF MULVIHILL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Speculation continues over Cuomo run for NYC mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There has been growing speculation this week that former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is rapidly approaching a decision about whether or not to run for New York City mayor.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: NJ assemblyman's car stolen, house broken into
item.description: HAZLET, N.J. (PIX11) - Video from the home where a New Jersey assemblyman is currently living shows alleged burglars break into the home and speed away with his personal car - complete with State Assembly plates.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Trump announces his daughter Tiffany is pregnant: 'So that's nice'
item.description: Former President Donald Trump shared his daughter Tiffany and husband Michael are expecting a baby while giving remarks at the Detroit Economic Club on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Emily Stevens discusses accountability, safety, and fiscal responsibility on the Clark County School District Board
item.description: Emily Stevens, candidate for the Clark County School District Board of Trustees, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to discuss why she believes she's the right fit for the open seat in District A.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Michigan US Senate debate: Rogers, Slotkin race could determine control
item.description: Rogers and Slotkin meet on Tuesday for an hour-long debate hosted by Nexstar's WOOD-TV, beginning at 7 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Van Gilder, Fox 5

item.title: Trump secretly sent Putin COVID-19 tests during pandemic shortage, a new book reports
item.description: Vice President Harris is criticizing Trump over the reported shipment, which is detailed in a new book by the journalist Bob Woodward. The president's campaign has denied the reporting.
item.dc:creator: Jason Breslow, MPR News

item.title: Harris reveals owning a Glock: 'Of course' I've fired it
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris said in a "60 Minutes" interview that aired Monday that she owns a Glock and has fired it at a shooting range in another example of how she and her campaign have made a point to highlight her gun ownership.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5
